title: HexTweaks - Better T.O weapons
description: Made for T.O tweaks, it replaces all the weapons and make them more consistent and stylized
body:
_Made for T.O tweaks, this pack replaces all the weapons and make them more **consistent** and **stylized**_

# INSTRUCTIONS
1.  Download the resource pack, you should get a ZIP file
2.  Open the folder to which you downloaded the file
3.  Copy the ZIP file.
4.  Open Minecraft
5.  In Minecraft, click on **_Options_** then **_Resource Packs_**
6.  Choose **_Open resource pack folder_**
7.  Paste the file into the **resource folder** in Minecraft

#   DEPENDENCIES
- T.O tweaks and all of its required dependencies - [https://modrinth.com/mod/to-tweaks-irons-spells](https://modrinth.com/mod/to-tweaks-irons-spells)
  
![T.O tweaks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72b4506f18fbf1fd0171bc6f3483c6255437699e_0.webp)


**DONT REUPLOAD MY WORKS TO OTHER WEBSITES**
